home.title: Canadian Art & History
home.subtitle: Explore museum collections from across Canada — photographs, paintings, and cultural artifacts with audio descriptions.

document.audioLabelFrTts: French narration (voice reads the text below)
document.audioUnsupported: Your browser does not support the audio element.
document.emptyComments: No comments yet. Be the first to share your thoughts!
document.commentsOfflineBanner: No connection to the SQL backend. Comments may only show from this browser. Run npm run dev:full (or npm run server while using npm run dev) so posts go to SQLite at server/heritage.db.
document.commentSavedLocalOnly: Saved in this browser only. Start the API with npm run server (use npm run dev:full for both) to store comments in the SQLite database.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.browseDesc: — View all artworks in the collection. Click any item to see details.
help.listenDesc: — Each item has an audio description. Use the player to hear the narration.
help.commentDesc: — Share your thoughts on each artwork. Comments are stored in the database.
help.zoomDesc: — Click any image to open it in a lightbox and zoom in or out.
help.contact: Contact your course TA or visit the SEG3125 course page.
